title: argyranthemum broussonetii
intro: Argyranthemum broussonetii, also known as the Canarian daisy, is a flowering plant native to the Canary Islands, belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and polyphenols, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Argyranthemum broussonetii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its potential health benefits.
